methodsAttempted.notes: Fetched https://www.cam.ac.uk/ai — research showcase landing page, no policy content. Rejected as research_showcase_only.
Fetched https://www.ai.cam.ac.uk/ — ai@cam research initiative homepage. No policy/guidance content. Rejected as research_showcase_only.
Fetched data-protection/guidance page which lists AI guidance as a sub-item. Verified the AI guidance page itself.

Expanded /artificial-intelligence-and-education/ path. Found 4 sub-pages (generative-ai-and-assessment, using-generative-ai, generative-ai-and-education, ai-policy-framework). All verified as official Cambridge BLS guidance.
Checked plagiarism-and-academic-misconduct (verified, general academic integrity) and policy-index/recording (rejected, no AI content).
Tried /guides/artificial-intelligence — 404. No AI-specific UIS guide found.
Checked /service/security and /policies — generic IT security, no AI content.
Tried /offices/hr/genai — redirects to generic HR homepage. No GenAI HR guidance found.

Tried /what-academic-misconduct/artificial-intelligence — redirects to educationalpolicy.admin.cam.ac.uk/plagiarism-and-academic-misconduct (generic, no AI content). Old AI-specific page no longer exists.
Checked old BLS paths (/guidance-support/ai-and-education/*) which redirect to homepage. Confirmed current canonical paths are /artificial-intelligence-and-education/*.
User-provided seed URLs verified: information-compliance AI guidance (verified), 4x blendedlearning.cam.ac.uk AI pages (all verified).

artifacts.summary: Cambridge AI policy discovery: 6 verified official sources, 10 rejected. Cambridge has a well-structured AI policy landscape across three main subdomains: (1) Information Compliance Office (staff admin GenAI guidance), (2) Blended Learning Service (education-focused AI guidance, assessment policy, AI policy framework), (3) Educational Policy Office (academic integrity). No dedicated UIS/IT AI policy page exists. No HR-specific GenAI guidance found. The cam.ac.uk/ai and ai.cam.ac.uk sites are research showcases, not policy sources. Cambridge's approach is decentralized — education policy lives on blendedlearning.cam.ac.uk, admin/data-protection policy on information-compliance.admin.cam.ac.uk.
